reviews.review_description: I absolutely love the concept of this game and being immersed inside real paintings. Looking forward to seeing it develop. I did find it a little bit awkward to use the menu on the wrist and at one point the vase I drew in reception decided to sit inside the desk rather than on top of it. But, I still really enjoyed playing and love the idea.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Coldtulip for your review, we're so happy you loved the concept ! 

Since you joined our discord (thanks btw!), we'll contact you to dig into the problems you mentioned, we'll try to solve this quickly.

reviews.review_title: Strong Art with very bad technical side.
reviews.review_description:
I made an effort to rate it 5 stars, but at this stage it simply isn’t possible. There are many fantastic ideas here. The artistic style is unique in VR, the interactions are highly innovative, the atmosphere is immersive, and the characters are compelling.

However, regarding VR iteration, although the intention is innovative and creative, and highly commendable, it is paradoxically also its weakest aspect. The technical side falls far below modern industry standards. The hand positioning is incorrect, there are too many buttons and too much UI for a VR game, the frame rate did not perform well on Quest 2, and objects frequently desynchronize from the hand.

There are numerous technical issues that significantly hinder the experience, even though the artistic execution was masterful. I genuinely hope these problems are addressed. The project has the potential to become a cult classic in the future.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Natan, for playing the demo and for your complete review.

We're very pleased that you see Painted Realms as a potential cult classic (that's by far the best compliment we could hope for). We'll do our best to improve the tech aspects in future updates and earn that 5th star! 

It would be amazing if you could join us on Discord. Detailed comments like this are priceless to us.
